title: Express Entry Reports and Publications - Canada.ca
content:
## Express Entry Reports and Publications
Access reports and publications about Express Entry. Express Entry is an application management system for the Federal Skilled Workers Program, the Federal Skilled Trades Program, the Canadian Experience Class and a portion of the Provincial Nominee Program.
- 2024-2025 Report to Parliament – Category-Based Selection in Express Entry
